story.iWant: the particles to transform into photos
story.soThat: I understand the connection between the tree and the memories
story.tasks: - [ ] **Texture Atlas Generation** (AC: 4) - [ ] Create utility/logic to load photo textures and create a Texture Atlas (or use `useTexture` with an atlas image if pre-generated). - [ ] Pass texture atlas uniform (`uTextureAtlas`) to the shader. - [ ] **Shader Enhancement (`particle.vert`)** (AC: 1) - [ ] Add attribute for `aUvOffset` (to select photo from atlas) and `aRandom` (for variation). - [ ] Implement scaling logic: Increase `gl_PointSize` significantly as `uProgress` approaches 1.0 to match "card size". - [ ] **Shader Enhancement (`particle.frag`)** (AC: 2) - [ ] Implement `mix()` logic: `mix(glowColor, textureColor, smoothstep(0.5, 1.0, uProgress))`. - [ ] Sample from texture atlas using `gl_PointCoord` and `aUvOffset`. - [ ] Apply "Polaroid" frame effect (optional, or part of texture). - [ ] **Component Update (`TreeParticles.tsx`)** (AC: 1, 4) - [ ] Generate `aUvOffset` attributes for particles (assigning random photos to particles). - [ ] Pass texture atlas to `ExplosionMaterial`. - [ ] **Integration & Verification** (AC: 3, 5) - [ ] Verify smooth transition from dot to photo. - [ ] Verify floating behavior (inherited from 2.2, ensure it looks good with cards). - [ ] Verify performance >30fps.

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. **Given** the explosion animation is active, **When** `uProgress` increases, **Then** particles should scale up to "card size". 2. **And** the texture should cross-fade from "glow dot" to "photo texture" (FR10). 3. **And** the particles should end up in a floating, drifting state (FR11). 4. **And** a Texture Atlas is implemented to efficiently render multiple photos. 5. **And** performance remains >30fps during the morphing effect.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR10: System can smoothly transform particle form to photo cards (scale + texture cross-fade) during explosion. FR11: System can make photos enter floating state (3D rotation + drift) after transformation.

doc.title: Architecture Decision Document
doc.snippet: GPU State Machine Interpolation: Attributes `uvOffset` & `uvScale` map to specific photos in Texture Atlas. Vertex Shader mixes vertex color and Texture sample based on `uProgress`.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Phase 1: Explosion & Morphing - Particles morph from tree colors to Polaroid textures via cross-fade and scale-up. Phase 2: Floating & Immersion - Double-sided Polaroid textures.

item.reason: Main component handling particle generation and material. Needs to generate `aUvOffset` and pass texture atlas.
Vertex shader needs to handle `aUvOffset` and scaling logic based on `uProgress`.
Fragment shader needs to implement `mix()` logic for color/texture transition and sample from texture atlas.
Should define paths for photo textures or atlas.

constraints.constraint: Performance: Must maintain >30fps during morphing effect (FR5, NFR-P1).
Resource Optimization: Use Texture Atlas to reduce GPU calls (NFR-P5).

interface.name: ExplosionMaterial Uniforms
interface.signature: uniform float uProgress; uniform sampler2D uTextureAtlas; uniform float uTime;

interface.name: Particle Attributes
interface.signature: attribute vec2 aUvOffset; attribute float aRandom;

tests.standards: Visual regression testing (manual) for the morph effect. Performance monitoring (FPS).

ideas.idea: Verify smooth transition from dot to photo as `uProgress` goes from 0 to 1.
Verify particles scale up to card size.
Verify texture atlas is correctly sampled (different photos on different particles).
Verify performance stays above 30fps with full particle count.
